prompt: Part 4 generation started with config: {"difficulty":"easy","count":5,"speechType":null,"industry":null}

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Company announcement (企業からのお知らせ)
【Industry】: Personal Care Services (美容・パーソナルケア)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: next_action, location, inference
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=B, Question 3=A

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Company spokesperson",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good morning, everyone. We are pleased to announce that our new skincare range will be launching next week. To celebrate, we are hosting a special event at our downtown store. Join us this Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM for exclusive product demonstrations and refreshments. You'll also have the chance to meet our skincare experts who will offer personalized advice. Don't miss out on this opportunity to discover our innovative products and treatments. We look forward to welcoming you all.",
    "topic": "Announcement of a new skincare product launch event"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the next action the company is planning?",
      "options": [
        "Hosting a special event",
        "Releasing an online newsletter",
        "Launching a fragrance line",
        "Organizing a staff meeting"
      ],
      "correct": "Hosting a special event",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、今週の土曜日に特別なイベントが開催されることが明確に述べられています。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "Where will the event take place?",
      "options": [
        "At a conference hall",
        "At the downtown store",
        "In the main office",
        "In an online webinar"
      ],
      "correct": "At the downtown store",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、イベントがダウンタウンストアで行われると述べられています。",
      "questionType": "location"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Why might customers be interested in attending the event?",
      "options": [
        "To get personalized skincare advice",
        "To apply for a job",
        "To participate in a survey",
        "To attend a workshop on finance"
      ],
      "correct": "To get personalized skincare advice",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "お知らせでは、スキンケアの専門家から個人的なアドバイスを受けられることが強調されています。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Speech Type: company_announcement
Industry: personal_care
Speaker Role: Company spokesperson
Topic: Announcement of a new skincare product launch event

Speech Text:
Good morning, everyone. We are pleased to announce that our new skincare range will be launching next week. To celebrate, we are hosting a special event at our downtown store. Join us this Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM for exclusive product demonstrations and refreshments. You'll also have the chance to meet our skincare experts who will offer personalized advice. Don't miss out on this opportunity to discover our innovative products and treatments. We look forward to welcoming you all.

}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Event announcement (イベント案内)
【Industry】: Food and Beverage (飲食業)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: detail, main_purpose, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=A, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Event Coordinator",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good afternoon, everyone! I am delighted to announce the opening of our annual Food and Beverage Festival. This exciting event will take place on Saturday, October 15th, at Central Park from 10 AM to 6 PM. We invite you to come and taste delicious meals from all around the world. There will be live cooking demonstrations, and top chefs will share their tips and techniques throughout the day. It's a perfect event for food lovers, families, and anyone looking to enjoy some great dishes and live entertainment. Don't miss out on the raffle at 4 PM, where you could win vouchers for our participating restaurants. Bring your appetite and get ready for a fun-filled day!"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What time is the raffle held during the festival?",
      "options": ["10 AM", "12 PM", "2 PM", "4 PM"],
      "correct": "4 PM",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチの最後のほうで、4 PMにくじ引きがあると述べられているため。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the purpose of the announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To invite people to the Food and Beverage Festival",
        "To provide a cooking class schedule",
        "To announce a new restaurant opening",
        "To sell tickets for a concert"
      ],
      "correct": "To invite people to the Food and Beverage Festival",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチ全体を通して、このイベントに人々を招待することが主目的であることが明確であるため。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the event mentioned?",
      "options": [
        "To teach cooking skills",
        "To celebrate food from around the world",
        "To launch a new product",
        "To promote healthy eating"
      ],
      "correct": "To celebrate food from around the world",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "イベントは、世界中の料理を祝うためのものであると述べられているため。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    }
  ]
}
```

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Radio or podcast broadcast (ラジオ・ポッドキャスト放送)
【Industry】: Education (教育)
【Difficulty】: easy
【Question Types】: detail, inference, detail
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=A, Question 2=D, Question 3=C

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Host",
      "role": "Radio show host",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Welcome back to Learning Corner, your go-to podcast for educational insights. Today, we're discussing tips on how to improve your study habits. First, set specific goals for each study session. This helps you stay focused and motivated. Also, try to eliminate distractions by choosing a quiet place to study. Remember, short breaks are essential to maintain concentration. Finally, make use of online resources, such as videos and articles, to supplement your learning. These strategies can greatly enhance your efficiency and help you achieve better academic results.",
    "topic": "Study habits improvement tips"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the first study tip mentioned in the podcast?",

        "Drink plenty of water.",
        "Review notes regularly."
      ],
      "correct": "Set specific goals for each session.",
      "correctPosition": "A",
      "explanation": "スピーチの冒頭で、最初に話者は「set specific goals」というアドバイスをしている。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "Why are short breaks considered important, according to the podcast?",
      "options": [
        "They make studying more fun.",
        "They help you remember what you've learned.",
        "They allow you to snack.",
        "They help maintain concentration."
      ],
      "correct": "They help maintain concentration.",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、短い休憩が集中力を維持するために重要であると述べている。",
      "questionType": "inference"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What online resources are suggested to supplement learning?",
      "options": [
        "Podcasts and documentaries.",
        "Books and e-courses.",
        "Videos and articles.",
        "Quizzes and tests."
      ],
      "correct": "Videos and articles.",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "スピーチの中で、ビデオと記事を学習の補助として使用することが提案されている。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Speech Type: public_event_notice
Industry: legal_services
Speaker Role: Event coordinator
Topic: Annual Legal Insights Symposium announcement

Speech Text:
Good afternoon, everyone. We are delighted to welcome you to the annual Legal Insights Symposium. Today, the event will be held at the Grand Conference Hall located downtown, starting at 10 a.m. and concluding at 4 p.m. Our keynote speaker, who is one of the leading experts in corporate law, will commence the sessions at 10:30 a.m. Please make sure to pick up your free registration packet at the entrance, which includes a program schedule and a badge. After the closing remarks, there will be a reception where you can network with other professionals in the legal field. We hope you enjoy the event and find it enriching.
